title: Personal Portfolio v2
description: Full redesign of personal portfolio. Content managed through Astro content collections (JSON-driven) for static generation and easy localization.

title: Orchi Softair Website v2
description: Ground-up rewrite of the production website for A.S.D. Gli Orchi Trieste. Migrated from React/Vite/Appwrite to Next.js App Router with a Supabase backend, shadcn/ui component system, and automated CI/CD via Vercel.

title: Custom Game Engine
description: Game engine with a Rust core, using wgpu for GPU abstraction and Bevy ECS patterns for systems design. Editor and tooling UI built with React and Tauri. Private, ongoing — not a demo project.
